section.title: Key Words
section.para: The key words "MUST", "MUST NOT", "REQUIRED", "SHALL", "SHALL NOT", "SHOULD", "SHOULD NOT", "RECOMMENDED", "NOT RECOMMENDED", "MAY", and "OPTIONAL" in this document are to be interpreted as described in BCP 14 [RFC2119] and [RFC8174] when, and only when, they appear in all capitals, as shown here.

para.emphasis: < Placeholder: describe any standards or typographical conventions that were followed when writing this document, such as fonts or highlighting that have special significance. If there are no typographical conventions then put "None". >
